lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਉਬਰੇ ਜਿ ਆਪਿ ਮੇਲੇ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh ubare ji aap mele karataar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs are saved; the Creator Lord unites them with Himself. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਸਚੈ ਦਰਿ ਸੋਹਦੇ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat sachai dar sohade sachai sabad rahaae |
lines.english: The devotees look beauteous in the True Court of the Lord; they abide in the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਤਿਨ ਊਪਜੀ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਕਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har kee preet tin aoopajee har prem kasaae |
lines.english: The Lord's Love wells up in them; they are attracted by the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਹਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਰਸਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਿਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: har rang raheh sadaa rang raate rasanaa har ras piaae |
lines.english: They abide in the Lord's Love, they remain imbued with the Lord's Love forever, and with their tongues, they drink in the sublime essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਝੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਫਿਰੈ ਬਿਲਲਾਦੀ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਖੁਆਏ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: baajh guroo firai bilalaadee doojai bhaae khuaae |11|
lines.english: Without the Guru, they wander around crying out in misery; in the love of duality, they are ruined. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਜਿਨੑੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਰਿਦੈ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: safal janam jinaee guramukh jaataa har jeeo ridai vasaae |
lines.english: Fruitful are the lives of those Gurmukhs who recognize the Lord and enshrine Him in their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਭਗਤੀ ਖਟਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਉਤਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kalijug meh naam nidhaan bhagatee khattiaa har utam pad paaeaa |
lines.english: In the Dark Age of Kali Yuga, the devotees earn the treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord; they obtain the supreme status of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਆ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sev har naam man vasaaeaa anadin naam dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, they enshrine the Lord's Name in their minds, and they meditate on the Naam, night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚੇ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨਿ ਉਦਾਸੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੋਹੁ ਜਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: viche grih gur bachan udaasee haumai mohu jalaaeaa |
lines.english: Within the home of their own selves, they remain unattached, through the Guru's Teachings; they burn away egotism and emotional attachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੋਈ ਪਾਏ ਜਿਸੁ ਧੁਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aisaa satigur soee paae jis dhur masatak har likh paaeaa |
lines.english: He alone finds such a True Guru, upon whose forehead the Lord inscribed such pre-ordained destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਤਰਿਆ ਕੁਲ ਜਗਤੁ ਤਰਾਇਆ ਧੰਨੁ ਜਣੇਦੀ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aap tariaa kul jagat taraaeaa dhan janedee maaeaa |
lines.english: They save themselves, and they save the whole world. Blessed are the mothers who gave birth to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਆਪਣੇ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak balihaaree gur aapane vittahu jin bhram bhulaa maarag paaeaa |1|
lines.english: Servant Nanak is a sacrifice to his Guru; when he was wandering in doubt, He placed him on the Path. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਮਾਇਆ ਵੇਖਿ ਭੁਲੇ ਜਿਉ ਦੇਖਿ ਦੀਪਕਿ ਪਤੰਗ ਪਚਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun maaeaa vekh bhule jiau dekh deepak patang pachaaeaa |
lines.english: Beholding Maya with her three dispositions, he goes astray; he is like the moth, which sees the flame, and is consumed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਪੜਹਿ ਨਿਤ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਨਾਵਹੁ ਦਯਿ ਖੁਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae parreh nit bikhiaa naavahu day khuaaeaa |
lines.english: In the love of duality, they read continually about sin, while the Lord has withheld His Name from them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤ ਭੁਲਿ ਭੁਲਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਵੇਖਹਿ ਦਿਖਾ ਕਿਨੈ ਕਿਹੁ ਆਣਿ ਚੜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: panddit bhul bhul maaeaa vekheh dikhaa kinai kihu aan charraaeaa |
lines.english: The mistaken, deluded Pandits gaze upon Maya, and watch to see whether anyone has offered them something.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੀ ਜੰਗਮ ਸੰਨਿਆਸੀ ਭੁਲੇ ਓਨੑਾ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ਬਹੁ ਗਰਬੁ ਵਧਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jogee jangam saniaasee bhule onaa ahankaar bahu garab vadhaaeaa |
lines.english: The Yogis, the wandering hermits and the Sannyaasees have gone astray; their egotism and arrogance have increased greatly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਤੜਿਆ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਸਮਧਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: etarriaa vichahu so jan samadhaa jin guramukh naam dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: Among these, he alone is a man of poise, who, as Gurmukh, meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਾਦਨੁ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਨ ਲੈਹੀ ਸਤ ਭਿਖਿਆ ਮਨਹਠਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: chhaadan bhojan na laihee sat bhikhiaa manahatth janam gavaaeaa |
lines.english: They do not accept the true donations of clothes and food, and their lives are ruined by their stubborn minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਈਐ ਜਾ ਕਰਦੇ ਸਭਿ ਕਰਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kis no aakh sunaaeeai jaa karade sabh karaaeaa |2|
lines.english: Unto whom should servant Nanak speak and complain? All act as the Lord causes them to act. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਸਿਰਕਾਰ ਹੈ ਏਨੑਾ ਉਪਰਿ ਜਮ ਕਾ ਡੰਡੁ ਕਰਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eeh jam kee sirakaar hai enaa upar jam kaa ddandd karaaraa |
lines.english: Because of them, mortals are subject to death; above their heads hangs the heavy club of the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਪਰੇਤੁ ਹੈ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu paret hai kaam krodh ahankaaraa |
lines.english: Emotional attachment to Maya, sexual desire, anger and egotism are demons.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਬਧੇ ਮਾਰੀਅਨਿ ਕੋ ਸੁਣੈ ਨ ਪੂਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jam pur badhe maareean ko sunai na pookaaraa |
lines.english: In the City of Death, they are tied up and beaten, and no one hears their cries.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਜਮ ਮਗਿ ਪਾਈਅਨੑਿ ਜਿਨੑ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh jam mag paaeeana jina doojaa bhaau piaaraa |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs, in love with duality, are led onto the path of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਮਤਾ ਮੋਹਣੀ ਮਨਮੁਖਾ ਨੋ ਗਈ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai mamataa mohanee manamukhaa no gee khaae |
lines.english: By egotism and pride, the self-willed manmukhs are enticed, and consumed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: jis no kripaa kare tis gur milai guramukh nisataaraa |12|
lines.english: One who is blessed by the Lord's Grace meets the Guru; as Gurmukh, he is emancipated. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਮੋਹਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਦੇ ਤਿਨਾ ਵਿਆਪਿ ਰਹੀ ਲਪਟਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo mohi doojai chit laaeide tinaa viaap rahee lapattaae |
lines.english: Those who center their consciousness on duality are caught in it, and remain stuck.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਰਜਾਲੀਐ ਤਾ ਏਹ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad parajaaleeai taa eeh vichahu jaae |
lines.english: But when it is burnt away by the Word of the Guru's Shabad, only then does it depart from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਾ ਮਾਰਣੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak maaeaa kaa maaran har naam hai guramukh paaeaa jaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord's Name is the antidote to Maya; the Gurmukh obtains it. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਉਜਲਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: tan man hovai ujalaa naam vasai man aae |
lines.english: The body and mind become radiant and bright, and the Naam, the Name of the Lord, comes to dwell within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਕੇਤੜਿਆ ਜੁਗ ਭਰਮਿਆ ਥਿਰੁ ਰਹੈ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man ketarriaa jug bharamiaa thir rahai na aavai jaae |
lines.english: This mind has wandered through so many ages; it has not remained stable - it continues coming and going.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਾਣਾ ਤਾ ਭਰਮਾਇਅਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਪਰਪੰਚੁ ਖੇਲੁ ਉਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har bhaanaa taa bharamaaeian kar parapanch khel upaae |
lines.english: When it is pleasing to the Lord's Will, then He causes the soul to wander; He has set the world-drama in motion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਹਰਿ ਬਖਸੇ ਤਾ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲੈ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa har bakhase taa gur milai asathir rahai samaae |
lines.english: When the Lord forgives, then one meets the Guru, and becoming stable, he remains absorbed in the Lord.
